title: acetosella modesta
intro: Acetosella modesta, also known as the bog cranberry or small cranberry, is a low-growing, evergreen perennial plant native to acidic bogs in New Zealand and Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Acetosella modesta include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Acetosella modesta can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
